steps.title: Read the period values
steps.content: The passage defines an RRAT's period as the time between consecutive pulses. The table lists J0614-03 at 0.136 seconds, which is lower than J0103+54, J1654-2335, J0545-03, and J0121+53.

steps.title: Check each table claim
steps.content: B is false because J0545-03 and J0121+53 have different periods. C is false because J1654-2335 is not the longest. D is false because J0103+54 is under one second. The remaining statement matches the smallest value in the table. The answer is A.
